description.en: Fonio, West Africa's oldest cultivated grain and once a food reserved for chiefs and royalty, mixes into a sweet, chemically leavened quick bread with plant milk and oil. No eggs, no dairy, no yeast, just a fast batter with a nutty flavor a little like cornbread.
description.de: Fonio, Westafrikas ältestes Kulturgetreide, einst Häuptlingen vorbehalten, wird zu süßem, chemisch gelockertem Schnellbrot mit Pflanzenmilch und Öl verrührt. Ohne Ei, Milchprodukte oder Hefe, nur ein schneller Teig mit nussigem, maisbrotartigem Geschmack.
description.es: El fonio, cereal cultivado más antiguo de África occidental y antaño reservado a jefes y realeza, se mezcla en un pan rápido dulce y de leudado químico con leche vegetal y aceite. Sin huevo, lácteos ni levadura, sabor a nuez parecido al pan de maíz.
description.fr: Le fonio, plus ancienne céréale cultivée d'Afrique de l'Ouest, jadis réservée aux chefs et à la royauté, se mélange en pain rapide sucré à levure chimique, avec lait végétal et huile. Sans œuf, produit laitier ni levure, goût de noisette proche du pain de maïs.

origin.region: West Africa (Senegal, Mali, Guinea, Burkina Faso, Nigeria)
origin.note: Fonio (acha) is considered Africa's oldest cultivated cereal, traditionally reserved for chiefs, royalty, Ramadan and celebrations in parts of West Africa. This sweet, wheat-blended quick-bread format is a modern diaspora adaptation, not a traditional preparation.

ingredients.note: or use self-raising flour and omit the baking powder below
any plant milk: soy, coconut or oat

yield.shape: loaf tin, or divided among lined cupcake cases

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine fonio flour, flour (or self-raising flour), baking powder, salt, sugar, plant milk and oil in a bowl until you have a thick, uniform batter.

method.title: Pan
method.summary: Pour into a lightly greased loaf tin, or divide among lined cupcake cases for individual portions.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake at 180°C for about 25 minutes until a skewer comes out clean.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Cool completely on a wire rack before serving.

source.adaptation: Self-raising flour decomposed into plain flour plus an estimated baking powder and salt content; cup weights for fonio flour and self-raising flour are estimates.
